cfRule.formula: OR(AND(LEFT($A25, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A25)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A25, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A25, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A25)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A25, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A25, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A25)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A25, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A25, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A25)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A25, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A214, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A214)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A214, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A214, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A214)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A214, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A214, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A214)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A214, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A214, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A214)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A214, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A27, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A27)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A27, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A27, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A27)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A27, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A27, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A27)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A27, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A27, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A27)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A27, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A30, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A30)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A30, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A30, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A30)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A30, 12)))))
OR(AND(LEFT($A30, 16)="select_multiple ", LEN($A30)>16, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A30, 17)))), AND(LEFT($A30, 11)="select_one ", LEN($A30)>11, NOT(ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" ", $A30, 12)))))
